creator: zeising@lysator.liu.se
text:
ftp4.se.freebsd.org is not in the list of mirrors in pc-sysinstall. The attached patch adds the mirror to the list of Swedish mirrors, as well as the list of IPv6 mirrors, since it has IPv6.

Fix: Attached patch adds ftp4.se.freebsd.org to the list of mirrors.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
